patterns.name: Labeled Form Field
patterns.intent: Collect a short value with an accessible label, helper copy, and optional error.
selectionRules: Use Input for one-line values.
Use Textarea when the expected answer is longer than one sentence.
Never rely on placeholder as the only label.
patterns.jsx: <Field.Root width="320px"><Field.Label>Email</Field.Label><Input placeholder="you@example.com" /><Field.HelperText>We only use this for account updates.</Field.HelperText></Field.Root>

patterns.name: Dialog Confirmation
patterns.intent: Ask the user to confirm a consequential action without losing page context.
patterns.composition: Dialog.Root with Title, concise Body, footer HStack containing secondary and primary/destructive Button.
selectionRules: Use Dialog for blocking decisions.
Use the danger palette for destructive confirmation.
Avoid long multi-step flows inside Dialog.
patterns.jsx: <Dialog.Root defaultOpen modal={false}><Dialog.Positioner position="absolute" inset="auto"><Dialog.Content maxW="380px" boxShadow="lg"><Dialog.Header><Dialog.Title>Delete project?</Dialog.Title></Dialog.Header><Dialog.Body><Text color="ads.muted">This permanently removes the project and its data.</Text></Dialog.Body><Dialog.Footer><HStack><Dialog.CloseTrigger asChild><Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button></Dialog.CloseTrigger><Button colorPalette="red">Delete</Button></HStack></Dialog.Footer></Dialog.Content></Dialog.Positioner></Dialog.Root>

patterns.name: Object Summary Card
patterns.intent: Represent one repeated entity in a collection.
patterns.composition: Card.Root with Header title/status, Body metadata, Footer actions.
selectionRules: Use one card per object.
Avoid nested cards.
Use Table when row/column comparison matters more than object browsing.
patterns.jsx: <Card.Root width="320px" variant="outline"><Card.Header><HStack justify="space-between"><Heading size="sm">Acme Inc.</Heading><Badge colorPalette="green">Active</Badge></HStack></Card.Header><Card.Body><DataList.Root orientation="horizontal"><DataList.Item><DataList.ItemLabel>Plan</DataList.ItemLabel><DataList.ItemValue>Enterprise</DataList.ItemValue></DataList.Item><DataList.Item><DataList.ItemLabel>Seats</DataList.ItemLabel><DataList.ItemValue>240</DataList.ItemValue></DataList.Item></DataList.Root></Card.Body><Card.Footer><Button size="sm" variant="outline">Open</Button></Card.Footer></Card.Root>

patterns.name: Persistent Feedback
patterns.intent: Keep status visible until the underlying condition changes.
patterns.composition: Alert.Root with Indicator, Title, Description, and an optional action nearby.
selectionRules: Use Alert for persistent feedback.
Use Toast/Toaster only when the message can disappear.
Match status to severity.
patterns.jsx: <Alert.Root status="warning" variant="surface" maxW="380px"><Alert.Indicator /><Alert.Content><Alert.Title>Payment method expiring</Alert.Title><Alert.Description>Update your card before the next billing cycle.</Alert.Description></Alert.Content></Alert.Root>

patterns.name: Page Header with Actions
patterns.intent: Title a view and expose its primary and secondary actions.
patterns.composition: Flex space-between: left Stack with Heading + supporting Text, right HStack of actions with one primary Button.
selectionRules: Expose at most one primary (brand) action per header.
Use Button for actions and Link/Breadcrumb for navigation.
Keep the supporting line to one sentence.
patterns.jsx: <Flex width="520px" align="center" justify="space-between" gap="4"><Stack gap="1"><Heading size="md">Team members</Heading><Text color="ads.muted">Manage who can access this workspace.</Text></Stack><HStack><Button variant="outline">Export</Button><Button colorPalette="brand">Invite</Button></HStack></Flex>

patterns.name: Empty State
patterns.intent: Explain why a region is empty and offer the next action.
patterns.composition: EmptyState.Root > Content with Indicator icon, Title, Description, and a single recovery action.
selectionRules: Give one clear next action, not several.
Use neutral, non-alarming copy for normal-empty (not error) states.
Reserve for genuinely empty regions, not loading (use Skeleton/Spinner).
patterns.jsx: <EmptyState.Root><EmptyState.Content><EmptyState.Indicator><Search size={28} /></EmptyState.Indicator><EmptyState.Title>No results found</EmptyState.Title><EmptyState.Description>Try adjusting your filters or search terms.</EmptyState.Description><Button mt="2" colorPalette="brand">Clear filters</Button></EmptyState.Content></EmptyState.Root>

patterns.name: Search and Filter Bar
patterns.intent: Let the user narrow a collection by free text and a category.
patterns.composition: HStack: InputGroup with leading search icon (flex 1) + a NativeSelect for the category facet.
selectionRules: Always give the search Input an accessible label.
Use Select/NativeSelect for finite facets, not free text.
Keep the search field the widest element in the row.
patterns.jsx: <HStack width="520px" gap="3"><InputGroup flex="1" startElement={<Search size={16} />}><Input aria-label="Search" placeholder="Search components" /></InputGroup><NativeSelect.Root width="160px"><NativeSelect.Field aria-label="Category"><option>All</option><option>Inputs</option><option>Layout</option></NativeSelect.Field><NativeSelect.Indicator /></NativeSelect.Root></HStack>

patterns.name: Metric Summary Row
patterns.intent: Show a few headline numbers side by side at the top of a dashboard.
patterns.composition: HStack of equal-width outline Cards, each wrapping a Stat.Root with Label + ValueText.
selectionRules: Keep to 2-4 metrics; more belongs in a Table.
Use Stat.Label + Stat.ValueText only inside the dl (no bare spans).
Right-align or format numbers consistently.
